name: Punk Hazard
region: New World - First Island After Fish-Man Island
description: Punk Hazard is a bizarre island in the New World permanently divided into two extreme halves: one side engulfed in eternal flames and scorching heat, the other frozen in perpetual ice and snow. This unnatural division was caused by the 10-day duel between Admirals Akainu and Aokiji fighting for the position of Fleet Admiral after Marineford. The island was originally a top-secret research facility run by Dr. Vegapunk for the World Government, but four years before the Straw Hats arrived, a catastrophic chemical weapon experiment went wrong, forcing the island to be evacuated and declared off-limits. However, the island was secretly taken over by Caesar Clown, a former colleague of Vegapunk, who continued illegal experiments including creating artificial Devil Fruits (SMILEs), gigantification of children, and developing mass-murder weapons. The island became the stage for the Straw Hat-Heart Pirate alliance, marking the beginning of Luffy and Law's plan to take down Kaido by targeting his SMILE supply through Doflamingo.
history: Punk Hazard began as one of the World Government's most important research facilities, where the brilliant scientist Dr. Vegapunk conducted experiments on Devil Fruits, gigantification, weapons, and other classified projects. Four years before the Straw Hats' arrival, Caesar Clown - a rival scientist working under Vegapunk - conducted an unauthorized experiment with a chemical weapon called Shinokuni. The experiment went catastrophically wrong, releasing a deadly poisonous gas that killed or petrified everyone on the island. The incident forced the World Government to evacuate and seal off the island, declaring it too dangerous for habitation. After Marineford, Admirals Akainu and Aokiji fought their legendary 10-day duel here for the Fleet Admiral position, permanently transforming the island's climate into fire and ice. Akainu won and Aokiji left the Marines. After the duel, Caesar Clown returned to the abandoned island with the help of Donquixote Doflamingo and turned it into his secret laboratory. He kidnapped children from nearby islands and conducted cruel gigantification experiments using drugged candy to make them dependent and compliant. He also manufactured SAD - the key ingredient for SMILE artificial Devil Fruits that Doflamingo sold to Kaido. When the Straw Hats arrived pursuing a distress call, they discovered the children, exposed Caesar's crimes, and formed an alliance with Trafalgar Law. Together they defeated Caesar, rescued the children, and began their plan to dismantle the production of SMILEs, setting in motion the events that would eventually lead to taking down both Doflamingo and Kaido.
culture: Punk Hazard has no real culture as it's an abandoned government facility turned illegal laboratory. The environment is hostile and extreme - survival on either the burning or frozen side requires constant adaptation. Caesar's subordinates live in the laboratory's climate-controlled sections, conducting twisted experiments without moral boundaries. The giant children were manipulated through candy addiction, creating a tragic dynamic where victims were made to worship their captor. G-5 Marines under Smoker represent rough justice and are initially hostile but eventually ally with the Straw Hats against greater evil. The island embodies the dark side of scientific progress when ethics are abandoned - human experimentation, child abuse, weapons of mass destruction, and amoral research all conducted in secret. The physical division of fire and ice mirrors the moral extremes present: the burning passion for ambition (Caesar's mad science) versus the cold ruthlessness of those who enable it (Doflamingo's underworld network).

industries: SMILE artificial Devil Fruit production (SAD manufacturing)
economy.currency: Berry (฿) - funded by Doflamingo's underworld empire
tradeGoods: Experimental drugs and candy (for child control)

transportation: The island is surrounded by dangerous seas in the New World. Ships must navigate carefully to avoid the extreme temperature zones. Inside the island, Caesar's subordinates use gas-propelled sleds on the ice side and heat-resistant vehicles on the fire side. The laboratory has internal passages and elevators connecting different sections. Caesar himself flies using his Gas-Gas Fruit powers. The giant children were kept docile and couldn't leave. After the incident, Marine ships and Law's submarine arrived to evacuate survivors and prisoners.

cuisine: Marine mess hall food (G-5 base supplies)
Whatever could be scavenged or transported
traditions: No real dining culture - purely functional
quirks: Candy is weaponized as addiction control
Caesar's gas body doesn't need food

notablePeople.name: Caesar Clown
notablePeople.description: A former colleague of Dr. Vegapunk and master of the Gasu Gasu no Mi (Gas-Gas Fruit). Caesar is an amoral scientist obsessed with surpassing Vegapunk, conducting illegal experiments including child gigantification and creating Shinokuni poison gas. Manufactures SAD for SMILE production. Captured by Law and used as hostage.

notablePeople.name: Monet
notablePeople.description: A harpy woman with the Yuki Yuki no Mi (Snow-Snow Fruit) and Doflamingo's loyal spy disguised as Caesar's secretary. She has bird wings and talons instead of arms and legs. Deeply devoted to Doflamingo, willing to die for his plans. Fought Luffy and Zoro.

notablePeople.name: Vergo
notablePeople.description: A high-ranking G-5 Vice Admiral who is actually Doflamingo's first and most loyal crew member, having infiltrated the Marines for decades. Master of full-body Armament Haki. Fought Law and was cut in half along with the entire laboratory. Always has food on his face.

notablePeople.name: Trafalgar D. Water Law
notablePeople.description: The Surgeon of Death with the Ope Ope no Mi (Op-Op Fruit). Proposed alliance with Luffy to take down Kaido. His true goal is revenge against Doflamingo for killing Corazon. Orchestrated Caesar's capture and planned to destroy the SMILE factory.

notablePeople.name: Smoker
notablePeople.description: The Marine Vice Admiral with the Moku Moku no Mi (Smoke-Smoke Fruit) who has pursued Luffy since Loguetown. At Punk Hazard, he reluctantly teams up with the Straw Hats against Caesar and Vergo. Had his heart stolen by Law and was defeated by Vergo.

notablePeople.name: Tashigi
notablePeople.description: A Marine Captain and swordswoman who looks identical to Zoro's deceased friend Kuina. At Punk Hazard, Law swapped her mind with Smoker's body. She fights for justice and protecting children, allying with the Straw Hats against Caesar.

notablePeople.name: Kin'emon
notablePeople.description: A samurai from Wano with the ability to create clothes with his Fuku Fuku no Mi powers. Searching for his master's son Momonosuke. Comically traditional and easily flustered. Joins the Straw Hats to rescue Momonosuke and return to Wano.

notablePeople.name: Momonosuke
notablePeople.description: The young son of Wano's shogun Oden, transformed into a small Eastern dragon after eating Caesar's artificial Devil Fruit. Perverted despite being a child. His dragon form is pink and he can fly by creating flame clouds. Key to the Wano storyline.

notablePeople.name: Brownbeard
notablePeople.description: A former New World pirate who lost his legs to Basil Hawkins and was given alligator legs by Law. Became Caesar's subordinate but was betrayed when Caesar used him to test Shinokuni. Eventually helped the Straw Hats expose Caesar.

notablePeople.name: The Giant Children
notablePeople.description: Children kidnapped from nearby islands and subjected to Caesar's gigantification experiments. Drugged with addictive candy to keep them compliant. Named characters include Sind, Uzu, Konbu, and Biyo. Rescued by the Straw Hats and cured.

notablePeople.name: Smiley
notablePeople.description: Caesar's pet - a gigantic poisonous slime monster created from compressed Shinokuni gas and given a Devil Fruit (Sara Sara no Mi, Model: Axolotl). When killed, it released the deadly gas across the island. It smiled constantly, hence the name.

notablePeople.name: Baby 5
notablePeople.description: A maid-assassin from the Donquixote Pirates with the Buki Buki no Mi (Arms-Arms Fruit) allowing her to transform her body into any weapon. Easily manipulated and says yes to any request. Arrived to pick up Caesar.

notablePeople.name: Buffalo
notablePeople.description: A large man with the Guru Guru no Mi (Spin-Spin Fruit) allowing him to spin any part of his body like propellers to fly. Partnered with Baby 5. Arrived to pick up Caesar but was defeated by Franky.

subLocations.name: Burning Lands
subLocations.description: The half of Punk Hazard engulfed in eternal flames from Akainu's magma powers during the Admiral duel. The ground is constantly on fire, lava flows through the landscape, and the heat is unbearable. Home to fire-breathing dragons (actually modified by Vegapunk).

subLocations.name: Ice Lands
subLocations.description: The half of Punk Hazard frozen in perpetual ice and snow from Aokiji's ice powers during the Admiral duel. Everything is covered in thick ice and snow, temperatures are freezing, and blizzards are constant. Entry point for the Straw Hats.

subLocations.name: Central Laboratory
subLocations.description: The massive laboratory complex where Caesar conducts his experiments. Climate-controlled with multiple floors, research rooms, monitoring systems, and the biscuits room where giant children are kept. Contains Vegapunk's old equipment and Caesar's modifications.

subLocations.name: SAD Production Room
subLocations.description: The secret room where Caesar manufactures SAD - the key ingredient for SMILE artificial Devil Fruits. This is what Doflamingo needs for his deal with Kaido. Heavily guarded and hidden within the laboratory complex.

subLocations.name: Biscuits Room
subLocations.description: The room where the giant children are kept, fed drugged candy called 'biscuits' to maintain their gigantification and addiction. They worship Caesar as 'Master' due to drug manipulation. Site of emotional rescue by the Straw Hats.

subLocations.name: Central Lake
subLocations.description: The lake at the exact center of the island where fire and ice meet. Steam rises constantly from the clash of extreme temperatures. This neutral zone shows where Akainu and Aokiji's powers collided during their duel.

items.name: SAD
items.description: The key ingredient Caesar manufactures for creating SMILE artificial Devil Fruits. Doflamingo sells SMILEs to Kaido. Destroying SAD production is central to Law's plan to dismantle Kaido's army.

items.name: Shinokuni
items.description: Caesar's deadly poison gas weapon that petrifies and kills anyone who touches it. The accident four years ago involved this. Released island-wide when Smiley died, forcing everyone to flee.

items.name: Drugged Candy
items.description: Addictive candy given to the giant children to keep them compliant and dependent on Caesar. Contains chemicals that maintain gigantification and create psychological addiction.

items.name: Artificial Devil Fruit (Momonosuke's)
items.description: The artificial Devil Fruit that turned Momonosuke into a pink Eastern dragon. Caesar considered it a failure, but it actually works. Later revealed to be based on Kaido's Devil Fruit.

items.name: Vegapunk's Research Data
items.description: The abandoned research data and equipment left by Dr. Vegapunk when the facility was evacuated. Caesar used this as the foundation for his own experiments.

items.name: Smiley (Sara Sara no Mi, Model: Axolotl)
items.description: The giant poisonous slime monster that ate a Devil Fruit. When killed, it released Shinokuni gas island-wide. Represents Caesar's cruel experimentation.

items.name: Modified Fire Dragons
items.description: Dragons modified by Vegapunk that live in the Burning Lands. Can breathe fire and are extremely dangerous. One befriended the Straw Hats briefly.

items.name: Heart-Switching Device
items.description: Equipment in the lab that displays whose heart is where after Law uses his powers to swap them. Showed Smoker and Tashigi's hearts switched, among others.

factions.name: Straw Hat Pirates
factions.description: The crew that exposed Caesar's crimes, rescued the children, and formed an alliance with Law. First major arc after timeskip reunion.

factions.name: Heart Pirates
factions.description: Law's crew that proposed alliance with Luffy to take down Kaido. Law orchestrated Caesar's capture as part of revenge against Doflamingo.

factions.name: Caesar's Subordinates
factions.description: The illegal operation conducting human experiments and manufacturing SAD for SMILE production. All defeated or betrayed Caesar.

factions.name: G-5 Marines
factions.description: The rough Marine branch stationed in the New World. Reluctantly allied with Straw Hats against Caesar and exposed Vergo's betrayal.

factions.name: Donquixote Pirates (Off-Site)
factions.description: The underworld organization backing Caesar's operation to manufacture SAD for SMILE production sold to Kaido.

factions.name: Wano Samurai
factions.description: Samurai from Wano searching for Momonosuke and seeking help to return home. Introduction to the Wano storyline.

events: Arrive at Punk Hazard - island split fire and ice
Discover island changed by Akainu vs Aokiji duel
Group splits - some to fire side, some ice side
Law swaps Straw Hat minds/bodies (Nami-Sanji, Chopper-Franky)
Law swaps Smoker and Tashigi's hearts
Discover Caesar Clown runs the facility
Meet Monet - snow harpy and spy
Children addicted to drugged candy revealed
Alliance plan revealed: destroy SAD to stop SMILEs
Take down Kaido by cutting his army supply
True goal: Law's revenge on Doflamingo
Luffy crashes broadcast and declares war
Luffy defeats Caesar with Grizzly Magnum
Law cuts Vergo and entire laboratory in half
Baby 5 and Buffalo arrive for Caesar
Next target: Dressrosa to destroy SMILE factory
Kin'emon and Momonosuke join to reach Wano

quickFacts: Island split into fire and ice by Akainu vs Aokiji duel
Caesar manufactures SAD for SMILE production
Giant children kidnapped and experimented on
Law and Luffy alliance begins here
Smoker reluctantly allies with Straw Hats
Vergo exposed as decades-long Marine spy
Caesar captured as hostage to Doflamingo
Plan to take down Kaido initiated
First island after Fish-Man Island in New World

videos.title: Law Proposes Alliance to Luffy
videos.description: Trafalgar Law proposes the alliance with Luffy to take down a Yonko, beginning their partnership.

videos.title: Law Cuts Vergo and the Laboratory
videos.description: Law's incredible display cutting both Vergo and the entire laboratory in half with his Room ability.

videos.title: Luffy Defeats Caesar Clown
videos.description: Luffy defeats Caesar with Grizzly Magnum after crashing his broadcast to underworld buyers.
